components.value: V, S, DF, M (a pinch of silver dust)

description.value: This spell blesses a corpse with positive energy, preventing it from being turned into an undead creature. Attempts to raise the corpse as an undead automatically fail. If the corpse is of a person slain by a creature that creates undead out of its slain foes (such as a shadow, vampire, or wraith), that effect is delayed until the end of this spell. It is possible to protect a corpse for an extended time by casting this spell each day. Sanctify corpse can be made permanent with a permanency spell by a caster of 9th level or higher for the cost of 500 gp. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Roleplaying Game: Ultimate Magic.
